decision_set.hitl_policy: HITL required for all destructive write tools; centrally enforced and tested
decision_set.grounding_policy: Deal-specific answers require get_deal/search_deals; refuse if unavailable
decision_set.toolresult_schema: Unified ToolResult with success/data/error/metadata; robust parsing
decision_set.idempotency: All write tools include idempotency_key; backend enforces
decision_set.auth_model: actor_id verified against auth claims; tenant scoping enforced
decision_set.memory_strategy: Long-term memory enabled with deal-scoped retrieval + privacy controls
decision_set.rag_strategy: Provenance + freshness + SQL/DB fallback; explicit outage behavior
decision_set.observability: correlation_id propagation; Langfuse/OTel tracing; prompt version tracking
decision_set.evals: >=30 golden traces + adversarial suite; CI gate

phases.name: Phase 0 — Safety & Auth Hard Stop
phases.objective: Eliminate P0 unsafe behavior (HITL gaps, grounding, auth impersonation).
tasks: Add create_deal (and any write tools requiring approval, e.g., add_note if policy requires) to HITL_TOOLS and enforce centrally in requires_approval.
Enforce grounding policy in system prompt and add graph guard: deal-specific answers require get_deal/search_deals success.
Validate actor_id against auth claims for service-token requests; enforce tenant scoping and audit mismatches.
Add HITL bypass tests and grounding tests to eval harness.
phases.risks: Over-blocking legitimate flows; false HITL prompts.
phases.rollback: Feature-flag HITL enforcement and grounding guard; disable write tools temporarily.
gates: Gate B (HITL enforcement tests) must pass
Gate E (Auth impersonation tests) must pass
evidence: Golden trace showing create_deal returns pending_approval
Grounding test showing get_deal called before response
Adversarial auth test returns 403 on fake actor_id

phases.name: Phase 1 — Tool Contract Reliability & Loop Control
phases.objective: Make tool calls safe, structured, idempotent, and bounded.
tasks: Introduce ToolResult schema (success/data/error/metadata) and wrap all tool outputs; remove plain-string errors.
Add try/except around tool execution in _tool_call; return ToolResult error on exceptions.
Add idempotency_key to create_deal/add_note payloads and backend enforcement; document retry semantics.
Implement tool call budget (per turn and per conversation) and token budget guard.
Harden tool call parsing for malformed JSON; re-ask or fail with controlled error.
Fix dev mocks to use valid stage enums.
phases.risks: Breaking changes in tool response handling; existing clients expect strings.
phases.rollback: Feature-flag ToolResult output and provide backward-compatible wrapper.
gates: Gate A (Tool unit tests + ToolResult schema)
evidence: Unit tests show ToolResult success=false on errors
DB queries prove idempotency on double-call
Loop test halts at max tool calls

phases.name: Phase 2 — Observability & Prompt Governance
phases.objective: Make decisions traceable and prompts auditable; improve debugability.
tasks: Propagate correlation_id end-to-end (UI -> agent -> backend); bind to logs and tool headers.
Configure Langfuse/OTel tracing with startup health checks; ensure prompt_version logged per request.
Implement prompt versioning (header + hash) and dynamic tool list injection to prevent drift.
Add response logging with redaction and retention policy.
Create decision ledger for all tool actions with reasoning metadata.
phases.risks: PII exposure in logs; increased storage costs.
phases.rollback: Enable redaction-only logging mode; reduce retention window.
gates: Prompt version logged and tool list matches registry
evidence: Trace sample shows correlation_id across services
Decision ledger row per tool call with rationale

phases.name: Phase 3 — Memory, RAG & Provider Hardening
phases.objective: Enable reliable memory and deal-centric retrieval with provenance and fallback.
tasks: Enable long-term memory (mem0/pgvector) and add privacy controls (Forget tool).
Implement deal-scoped memory and DealContext loader.
Make mem0 provider configurable; support local embeddings to avoid OpenAI hard dependency.
Add RAG provenance + freshness metadata; implement SQL/DB fallback and circuit breaker when RAG is down.
phases.risks: Memory contamination across tenants; stale RAG results.
phases.rollback: Disable long-term memory; force explicit get_deal + recent_notes on each turn.
gates: RAG outage test must return explicit error + fallback
Memory retrieval tests confirm deal_id scoping
evidence: RAG results include provenance and timestamps

phases.name: Phase 4 — Deal Intelligence & Evals/CI
phases.objective: Make the agent deal-smart and prevent regressions.
tasks: Add stage transition matrix to prompt and enforce in tools; include stage-aware next-step recommendations.
Implement deal health scoring and surface in DealContext.
Expand golden traces to >=30 and add adversarial suite (prompt injection, malformed tool calls, outages).
Add CI gates to block deployment on eval regressions.
phases.risks: Eval suite flakiness; insufficient test coverage.
phases.rollback: Manual QA hold; rollback prompt to last known good version.
gates: Gate G (Eval regression gate) must pass
evidence: CI logs show golden_trace_runner + adversarial suite
Scenario tests show valid transitions and next-step recommendations

ZK-BRAIN-ISSUE-0002.dod: No deal answers without tool call

ZK-BRAIN-ISSUE-0021.task: Stage transition rules in prompt + tools

builder_missions.gate: Gate B + Gate C + Gate E
builder_missions.scope: HITL enforcement, actor_id verification, grounding policy + guard
acceptance: deal fact question triggers get_deal before answer
builder_missions.blocker_policy: If HITL or auth cannot be enforced safely, disable write tools and document action item.
builder_missions.next_rule: Proceed to Mission 2 when all P0 gates pass.

builder_missions.mission: Builder Mission 2 — ToolResult + Idempotency + Loop Control
builder_missions.scope: ToolResult schema, try/except, idempotency keys, tool call budget, mock fixes
acceptance: Loop test stops at max tool calls
builder_missions.blocker_policy: If ToolResult breaks clients, add backward-compatible wrapper and document.
builder_missions.next_rule: Proceed to Mission 3 after Gate A/D pass.

builder_missions.scope: correlation_id propagation, Langfuse/OTel, prompt versioning, dynamic tool list, response logging, decision ledger
acceptance: Decision ledger row per tool call
builder_missions.blocker_policy: If tracing config unavailable, enable local trace sink and log correlation_id for all requests.
builder_missions.next_rule: Proceed to Mission 4 after Gate F passes.

builder_missions.scope: Enable long-term memory, deal-scoped memory, RAG provenance/freshness + fallback, mem0 provider config
acceptance: RAG outage falls back to DB and returns explicit error
builder_missions.blocker_policy: If memory causes tenant leakage risk, keep it disabled and rely on DealContext.
builder_missions.next_rule: Proceed to Mission 5 when memory and RAG tests pass.

builder_missions.mission: Builder Mission 5 — Deal Intelligence + Eval Gates
builder_missions.scope: Stage rules, next-step recommendations, deal health scoring, expand golden traces, add adversarial suite, CI gates
builder_missions.blocker_policy: If eval suite flakey, quarantine failing traces and document action items.
builder_missions.next_rule: Ship criteria review after Gate G passes.

proof_artifacts: DB queries for idempotency and decision ledger
ship_criteria: All P0/P1 issues closed with verification
Gates A-G pass in CI and staging
